programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: After Hogan mines a bridge, he learns that a truck of Allied prisoners would be the first to cross it and a new plan is born which includes a flaming arrow from Sioux Indian Carter, aka Little Deer Who Goes Swift And Sure Through Forest.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Beniha-Ha, a bus boy takes center stage as a chef. Then, in The Witness, Carol and Harvey can't agree to the facts surrounding a car accident they witnessed. Finally, in The Other Secretary, Carol finds out her boss has been "cheating" on her by using another secretary.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Lavender Lipstick
programme.desc: A heiress to a cosmetics company is charged with the murder of the company's owner.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bitter, self-righteous man believes that he can will every evil person in the world to shrink to two-feet tall at four o'clock.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A shocking surprise awaits a woman who is about to meet her favorite star.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Ronald risks his future following the predictions of a fortuneteller.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: In order to help break up a narcotics ring, Peggy is recruited to pose as a prostitute.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "Reverend" Will can heal the sick by the power of faith. Or can he? Either way, his "powers" won't keep a witness to murder from coming forward, and that means... another murder.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: The heir to a fortune makes trouble for the woman who jilted him.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: When an employee of a diamond importing firm goes missing, Highway Patrol suspects foul play.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday's problem: is his temporary partner an aide—or an adversary?

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A 15-year-old car thief is given a tour of the jail in an attempt to show him the consequences for choosing crime.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: When old friends from Bryant Park move into the neighborhood, Steve is cast into the role of marriage counselor.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony explore the history of girl bands with a special guest."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: "The Cleavers are all excited about their annual summer vacation up to the cabin, that is except Wally. Wanting to be close to his latest girl, Wally wants to stay behind and gets permission to stay at Eddie's house during the two weeks the Cleavers are on vacation, but June and Ward are a bit unsure of Wally's plans."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally has been constantly spending his time at Julie Foster's house and June suggests that he's old enough to take her out on a dinner date. Julie suggests a new expensive restaurant called The White Fox. However, during the meal Wally discovers that he forgot his wallet at home.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Wednesday Woman
programme.desc: Released from prison after serving a sentence for the murder of his employer, Phillip maintains his innocence and may do something reckless to prove it. But it isn't long before Phillip is again arrested for murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: After a plastic surgeon is found dead after an argument with his partner about dissolving the business, the business partner is the immediate suspect, until Matlock meets the man's twin brother.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Harriet and Eugene are devastated after Gene's father is arrested for murder.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: A neighbor is being beaten by her drunken husband and the Waltons help

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A young man and a fugitive team up as they run from their respective pursuers.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Cartwrights discover that their friend, Dusty Rhoades, has taken in a young boy whose father was a slain rainmaker.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When an outlaw leader lures Marshal Torrance out of town, Lucas is the only one who can stop him from lynching a local man who killed one of the members of his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former army captain comes to North Fork to kill the man who shot down his son in a gunfight—Lucas McCain.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Duke quits the wagon train to take up a steady position as Deputy Indian Agent at San Marcos on an Apache reservation under Hiram Winthrope. Hiram is an Easterner with ideas of teaching the nomadic Apache to become farmers."

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed volunteers to write a profile on Malloy for the LAPD's magazine to honor his 10th anniversary on the force, but soon discovers he may be in over his head. Out on patrol, an apparent gas station armed robbery gets turned on its head when they question the parties after a long chase, a man goes to extreme lengths to get his neighbor's poodle to stop barking, a woman's plan to get her husband arrested backfires and a liquor store robbery suspect barricades himself inside a house's garage after a high-speed chase.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed gets stuck manning the front desk after spraining his wrist, where he must deal with a caller who claims to have planted a bomb at the station, a young man who wants to file a claim of police brutality and an elderly man who walks in with a shotgun. Meanwhile, Malloy is assigned a partner who is a first-day rookie, and they deal with three young children from Oklahoma who are abandoned by their mother, and engage in a high-speed pursuit that ends in a most unexpected way.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The 4077th faces a sleepless night as Charles's snoring keeps B.J. and Hawkeye from counting sheep. Meanwhile, Colonel Potter discovers that his son-in-law, Bob Wilson, has had an affair.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A military strategist refuses to accept responsibility for the war games that have mortally wounded his own son. And Margaret develops laryngitis, as she is about to meet her hero, Dr. Chesler.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Potter must deal with an old Army friend who is getting his own soldiers killed through his incompetency.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A wounded GI learns a painful lesson when he forms a recovery room friendship with the enemy soldier he's critically wounded.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: An infamous con artist, held temporarily in Mayberry, manages to enchant everyone except Andy.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy tries to help Barney express his lovestruck feelings for Thelma Lou.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly May and her new beau, Fred Penron, are getting rather serious. Meanwhile, Lafe Crick returns, this time with his son, Dub. He plans to set Dub up with Elly, to once again try to get some of Jed's money. Jed and Jethro try to hide this from Granny because the Cricks really rile her up. She sees the Cricks, but Jed tries to convince her that she is having visions.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: While in Pixley with the Douglases, Arnold witnesses a hold-up of the Pixley Bank. With his voice gone from squealing, a hoarse Arnold is unable to describe the crooks to the sheriff. The robbers learn that one Arnold Ziffle can identify them, so they come to the Douglas farm to silence him for good. They mistakenly kidnap Eb, not realizing that it was a pig who was the whole thing.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: Clearance Sale At The Black Market
programme.desc: After seeing something he shouldn't have, Schultz is ordered to the Russian front.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan leads Klink to believe a rabbit trap is a secret electronic device in order for Klink to bring an electronics expert, who wants to defect, to camp.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Twitches, Carol develops a twitch as Harvey describes an old flame. Then, in The Family, Eunice double dates with Mama.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Wandering Widow
programme.desc: When a man accused of a murder is freed from prison upon newly discovered eyewitness testimony, it starts a chain reaction of blackmail and murder.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A loud-mouthed braggart's boasts attract the attention of aliens.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A famous criminologist discovers that he has sent an innocent man to jail.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: An ex-con searches for a place to stay after he is released from prison.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix seeks to prove that the death of one of his former gal-pals was not an accident.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: A young dancer who teaches at a lonely hearts club winds up dead. One of his clients hires Cannot to find out who killed him. It isn't long before Frank discovers the dancer was also a con man who had bilked several women out of their life savings. And that lengthens the list of suspects considerably.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: The vanishing of boats and their crews may be caused by supernatural forces.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: The California and Mexican highway patrols hunt a car-theft ring operating across the border.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate the delay of death notifications in the state employment department.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The battered-child syndrome: Friday and Gannon investigate a youngster with severe back lacerations.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: When Ernie lands in an honors English class, his ogreish teacher makes him so uncomfortable that he can't concentrate on his work.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "It's a pre-Easter celebration at Toon in With Me!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver is scheduled to receive a football award at a father-son dinner being held in the school gym. While talking with his friends, Beaver learns that none of them are planning on wearing a jacket and a tie so when June and Ward insist that he wear one, he adamantly refuses.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Now that Wally is 17, he feels it's about time that he get his drivers license. However, June and Ward are a bit apprehensive about the idea of Wally driving, but Wally is persistant and finally gets his parents to agree to let him take a drivers class.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Accosted Accountant
programme.desc: When the son-in-law of a wealthy industrialist begins to question the man's judgement, Mason is called in to help reinforce the case. Soon, however, the industrialist is found dead and his son-in-law is the prime suspect.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock meets Conrad's new girlfriend, Carla Royce. When Carla's boss is murdered and she is suspected, Matlock defends her against the charge.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Sweet is heartbroken when an elderly woman who befriended him is murdered in her bookstore.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John-Boy needs a job. At the university, he convinces them to let him set up a television media program.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A girl's whip-wielding father does not approve of her romance with Quint.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Cartwrights discover the trouble Civil War veterans are having trying to resume their former lives.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new store owner upsets the town by demanding that all credit accounts be paid off.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The widow of a bandit killed by Lucas plots a grotesque revenge.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Chris Hale has dinner with a society matron whose carriage team he had stopped after being spooked. A rival for the woman's attention is Chris' first problem while the crew's attempt to sabotage their relationship is the second one."

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy's brand new car gets dinged up when he has to bail out to chase down a purse snatcher, but Sgt. MacDonald promises him his kid brother in Beverly Hills can fix it on the cheap. Out on patrol, he and Reed search for a drunk man accused of randomly shooting arrows, respond to a robbery at a deli that results in tragedy and search for a drug store robbery suspect who gets away after being shot.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed begin today's patrol by responding to a call of a drunken woman threatening the patrons of a bar with a handgun. Afterwards, they search for a group of four carjackers who go on a robbery spree after targeting a man with a cache of guns in his trunk, and investigate the suspicious death of a mentally disabled man.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Margaret and Hawkeye work on a time capsule to commemorate their time in Korea; Rizzo and B.J. goof around with a fake hand grenade; Klinger becomes smitten with a young, pretty Korean war criminal.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: "At the 4077th Mobile Army Surgical Hospital (M.A.S.H) unit in Korea, two army doctors by the names of Hawkeye Pierce and Trapper John McIntyre receive some exciting news in the mail. Their Korean house boy, Ho-John got accepted into Hawkeye's old college. Hawkeye and Trapper decide to hold a party filled with music, dancing, and alcohol to raise money for Ho-John's plane trip to the U.S. They achieve this by raffling off a weekend pass with a nurse, Lieutenant Dish for R&R in Tokyo."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: After black marketers hijack the 4077th's supply of hydrocortisone, Hawkeye and Trapper concoct a deal with local black marketer, Charlie Lee, to get some more. The catch: Henry's antique oak desk, which they must trade in order to get the medicine.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Trapper and Hawkeye seek to keep a new nurse from being transferred by Hot Lips, and they vie for her affection. Henry Blake, challenged by another commander to a boxing tournament, makes Trapper fight a big, intimidating soldier in exchange for keeping the nurse at the 4077th.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Opie go to great lengths to show Aunt Bee what a mess they'd be without her.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When a handsome new doctor arrives in town, his friendship with Ellie arouses suspicion in Aunt Bee and Barney and jealousy in Andy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale and Jane try to get the Clampetts interested in deep-sea fishing, but face an obstacle: Granny. She has a fear of water and refuses to go on a boat. So, Jane comes up with the idea of letting them visit Marineland. They decide to go right away and are impressed by the giant fishing holes. And Granny sees the fish of fishes, a giant whale.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Over Lisa's objections, Oliver plans on attending a farm symposium alone. To watch over her, he hires a charming young British man as a temporary farm hand. Determined to go along, Lisa plots to make Oliver so jealous of the handsome help that he wouldn't dare leave her behind.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: When Hogan tries to arrange the unscheduled escape of 20 men, his mission is complicated when a captured sergeant jumps the gun.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: Hogan's Trucking Service... We Deliver The Factory To You
programme.desc: Colonel Crittendon shows up again and messes up Hogan's plans to destroy a ball bearing plant.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In When My Baby Laughs at Me, a vaudeville sketch, Rock leaves Carol behind in order to pursue fame in New York.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Clumsy Clown
programme.desc: Two owners of a circus are trying to buy out each other. Both also are after a clown in the circus for the funds. The second owner is blackmailing him regarding his wife's second marriage.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An elderly couple visits the New Life Corporation, hoping to transport their personalities into youthful artificial bodies.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A toddler is the only witness to the murder of his babysitter.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A very poor janitor finds a wallet containing $5,000.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Haughty actor Mitch Cantrell is not exactly loved by his colleagues. When at a film shoot, a murder attempt is made on him, and it is soon up to Mannix to protect the obnoxious actor.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Kathy Ackers hires Cannon to find out why her father, a banker, committed suicide at a Caribbean resort. She thinks he was murdered, and wants Cannon to prove it. But the man was embezzling from his own bank, so maybe he did have a motive to kill himself...

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby must find a key witness to a murder hiding in a remote area before hit men do.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.sub-title: That Was The Night That Was
programme.desc: Kate Bradley's Shady Rest is patronized by a guest who gives every indication of being from outer space.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe has fallen in love with librarian Phyllis Marsh, who is opening a library inside the baggage car of the Cannonball.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny tries to conjure a man for Elly May, but accidentally attracts Miss Jane's man, who is actually a hired escort Mr. Drysdale got for Elly. When the Clampetts find out, they work to get rid of him so Miss Jane can have her man back.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts get a new next-door neighbor, and when Aggie, the maid of Mrs. Phillip Brentwood Carrington III, drops by to the use the phone, the Clampetts mistake her for Carrington. This is the first rich neighbor who has proven to be kind and considerate. Drysdale is happy because this rich woman has moved next door and might be a wife for Jed. Granny also sees her as a match for Jed. The two try to set Jed and Aggie up in different ways.

programme.title: Popeye and Pals
programme.sub-title: Snow Place Like Home, Bridge Ahoy!, Friend Or Phony
programme.desc: "Popeye and Olive are carried away to the North Pole by a hurricane., Popeye becomes angry with Bluto for throwing Wimpy into the water because he hasn't got his ferry fare., Bluto pretends to be dying from Popeye's last beating in order to convince the sailor to get rid of his spinach in remorse."

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.sub-title: Tom's Photo Finish, The Mad Maestro, Goggle-fishing Bear
programme.desc: "Tom frames the bulldog, Spike, for stealing food from the fridge but Jerry gets him on film doing it and tries to get the cat in trouble., A maestro conducts an orchestra of various animals but some of them aren’t very good at following his directions., Barney uses a dive mask and swim fins to help catch fish."

programme.title: The Woody Woodpecker Show
programme.sub-title: Kiddie League, Gooney's Goofy Landings, The Egg Cracker Suite, Rocket Racket, Charlie The Rainmaker, Crazy House, Under The Counter Spy
programme.desc: "Woody's Kiddle League Baseball team is in the championships and antic ensue., Chilly and Maxie teach Gooney to make more graceful landings., Oswald leads bunnies and chickens in an Easter-making melody., Gabby tries to lure Woody into being his dinner by pretending to recruit him to test out a Space Rocket., Charlie attempts to install a lawn sprinkler himself, but forgot to pay the water bill., Andy and his father take shelter from a storm in a fun house., Woody accidentally drinks a secret strength-giving tonic stolen by a master spy, The Bat. Woody uses his new powers to capture him."

programme.title: Bugs Bunny and Friends
programme.sub-title: Easter Yeggs, Pests For Guests, Hook, Line And Stinker, Mad As A Mars Hare, The Chocolate Chase, Rabbit Stew And Rabbits Too (1969), Bushy Hare
programme.desc: "Bugs helps out the exhausted Easter bunny by taking his place for the day. Elmer Fudd waits at his house ready to make 'wabbit' stew. , The new chest Elmer bought for his bedroom has been taken over by gophers. , Wile E. Coyote faces off against Road Runner again. , A rocket launching from Earth with Bugs inside crashes into Marvin Martian's lab. They both try to send the other away using their weapons, but Marvin turns Bugs into a Neanderthal rabbit instead., Daffy tricks local town mice out of chocolate Easter bunnies so they enlist Speedy to solve the problem. , A fox reads in a cookbook that the first thing he has to do before cooking is to catch a rabbit. , After drifting far out to sea while holding on to a bunch of balloons, Bugs Bunny is rescued by a passing stork -- only to be delivered into a mother kangaroo's pouch."

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.sub-title: The Night Of The Egyptian Queen
programme.desc: Agent Artemus Gordon and the curator of the San Francisco Museum are set upon in the Egyptian exhibit by three men wearing gas masks. When agents West and Mr. Heisel, the Egyptian government's representative, enter the room, they are also attacked. After regaining consciousness, the men discover that a priceless ruby has been stolen from the eye of the statue of Sun God, Ra. Commissioned by Miasmin, an Egyptian Princess, to recover the gem, West and Gordon trace a ransom note to a waterfront bar where Gordon poses as a sea captain. At the bar, West recognizes one of his assailants at the museum. The man identifies himself as Jason and indicates that Rosie, a beautiful young dancer at the bar, is wearing the ruby on her toe. Unfortunately, Rosie vanishes before West can make a move.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "When Comancheros wipe out a small wagon train ahead of them, Chris sends Bill and Duke to check it out. They find a young wounded Comanchero who tells them they are to be attacked. Chris' actions cause a mutiny."

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: One-time confederate spy Julia Saxon visits Stockton to much vilification. She is accused of murder, and Jarrod agrees to defend her despite his own mixed feelings, as he was once in love with her.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt searches for the real killer of Joe Silva when an old man is framed for the crime.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Dressed as an Easter Bunny and on his way to entertain children at an orphanage, Hoss must first grapple with a gang of inept outlaws.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Taken prisoner by a Prussian military officer, Clay, Wishbone and Jim incite upheaval among the European's slave workers when they speak about American freedom.

programme.title: Have Gun, Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin is hired to protect Oscar Wilde. Another 3 men apply for the job, but after Paladin upstages them they kidnap Wilde for ransom. Paladin takes care of them, his way.

programme.title: Wanted Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Four ex-Army personnel stage an mock trial accusing their former lieutenant of dereliction of duty.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his friend become trapped in an old mine.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark attempt to reform a con man.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.sub-title: Gents Without Cents, A Plumbing We Will Go, Three Little Twirps, Hot Scots, Three Hams On Rye, Horsing Around
programme.desc: "The Stooges are three small time actors looking for a job. They meet three girl dancers in the situation and get a small part in a big producers show at the shipyard. When the rest of the cast doesn't show up, the Stooges and the girls must put on the whole show themselves. The show is a hit and the Stooges marry the girls and head to Niagara Falls for their honeymoon. , To escape the police, the Stooges pose as plumbers and are hired to fix a leak in a fancy mansion. They wind up crossing the electrical system with the plumbing and generally ruin the place. One memorable scene has the lady of the house tuning into a television broadcast from Niagara Falls as a torrent of water pours from the set. To escape the wrath of the homeowners the Stooges escape through a magician's trap door. , A sequel (sort of) to "Hoofs and Goofs", the Stooges are taking care of their sister Birdie who has been reincarnated as a horse. When they learn that her mate "Schnapps", a famous circus horse, is about to be destroyed, they got to the circus grounds to rescue him. The Stooges are successful, and Birdie and Schnapps are reunited. , The Stooges get a job putting up posters for a circus but discover that instead of money, their pay is tickets to the show. When trying to scalp their tickets gets them in trouble, they hide out backstage where Curly has an encounter with a bearded lady and Moe and Larry hide in a horse suit. When they're caught, the circus manager gives them a choice of going to jail or joining the circus. What they don't know is that they are to be targets for the Zulu spear thrower. When Curly hits the spear thrower with one of his own spears, the boys are on the run once again. , The Stooges apply for job as 'Yard Men' at Scotland Yard, thinking they'll become detectives, but instead wind up as gardeners. When they learn that detectives are needed to guard a Scottish castle where valuables have been disappearing, they masquerades as Scotsmen to get the job. After a spooky night in the castle, the boys expose the servants as the crooks. , The Stooges are stagehands who also have small parts in a big play. They quickly get on the bad side of the producer. First they fail to prevent a famous critic from sneaking into the audience. Then Shemp accidentally adds a potholder into a cake they bake as a prop. During the play the Stooges (as southern gentlemen) and the rest of the cast spit up feathers during what was supposed to be a serious scene. The critic thinks it's a hilarious satire and the boys are redeemed "

programme.title: Svengoolie
programme.desc: "An anthropologist/paleontologist and his daughter, while travelling through the southwestern U.S., stumble upon a colony of living, breathing gargoyles who in the end only want to be left alone."

programme.title: Batman
programme.sub-title: Penguin Is A Girl's Best Friend
programme.desc: After spoiling the filming of the Penguin's new movie, Batman and Robin are forced to appear in the film. Then when Batman tries to spoil a nude milk bath scene with Marsha, the Queen of Diamonds, the Penguin arranges a steamy love scene between them.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: Kirk and Spock encounter an alien named Lazarus who claims to be from an anti-matter universe.

programme.title: Kolchak: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: The first based on a Native American legend, a Diablero shaman spirit murders for jewels to pay back his debt and be released from his Earthly bonds.

programme.title: Lost in Space
programme.desc: Dr. Smith is given a ring that turns anything he touches into platinum, but his joy soon becomes terror when even his food turns into the precious metal. In danger of starving to death because he cannot remove the ring, Smith scrambles to discover how to get the device off his finger.

programme.title: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
programme.desc: The leader of an amphibian race plans to take over the Seaview to use its nuclear power.

programme.title: Land of the Giants
programme.desc: Four rebellious teenage boys are stranded on the Land of the Giants when their shuttle crashes. The Spindrift crew meets them and hostilities soon break out.

programme.title: The Time Tunnel
programme.desc: Landing on Krakatoa in 1883, the time travelers try to convince a British scientist that the volcano is about to explode.

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: A colonel abuses his authority to attempt to force the aliens into a settlement, much to Vincent's disapproval.

programme.title: Thunderbirds
programme.desc: "Lady Penelope discovers her friend, the Duchess of Roysten is in need of financial assistance. Penelope helps the Dutchess to loan out her prized portrait of a gazelle to a New York tycoon. However, the Duchess is kidnapped by crooks who want the painting and the money owed to her."

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day, the gang flashes back to the romantic adventures they've had in the past.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: Slater and his father fight over where he should attend college and Zack tries to fix it. Meanwhile, Jessie becomes a cheerleader and worries about college acceptances.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: After Zack buys class rings for all the seniors at Bayside, he's embarrassed to find out he's been had when the rings turn out to be phonies.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: It's senior cut day. Zack does his best not to get caught by Belding. Meanwhile, Jessie protests the use of plastic cups.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: The gang decides to write a new school song together for a Bayside competition. Zack schemes to get them to compete against one another, and when they find out it's time for revenge.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: It's up to the gang to raise the funds needed for the senior prom.

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: Fred and Barney fake illness to go to a ball game.

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: After quarreling over the household budget with Fred, Wilma applies for a job at the Bedrock Radio-Television Corp.

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: Fred plans to take Wilma to the movies and bowl with his team simultaneously.

programme.title: The Jetsons
programme.desc: George accidentally goes through the Minavac, which shrinks him down to six inches high. The only way he can return to regular size, is by stealing a cog from Cogswell Cogs

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: When an FBI agent makes a visit to check Mike's security clearance, Bobby and Oliver both become convinced that Mike is working on some plans for a top secret project. They later become suspicious of Sam and become convinced that he plans to steal the "secret plans" and pass them on to the Russians.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan needs glasses but doesn't want to wear them because of how they make her look — until she has an accident that destroys Mike's surprise anniversary gift to Carol, a framed portrait of the Brady kids.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally and Beaver are helping Ward clean out the garage when they run across Beaver's old teddy bear, Billy. Beaver reluctantly throws him away after Ward and Wally tell him he's too old for dolls. However, Beaver changes his mind but he's too late: the garbage truck came, which leads Beaver to take drastic measures to get him back.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally jumps at the chance to paint a couple of garbage cans for Ward, who offers 50 cents a piece. However, when Eddie tells Wally that his father was charged $3.00 to have his painted, he becomes disinterested in the job and Beaver takes it over.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale organizes a financial syndicate, which includes a billionaire who he wants in his bank. Jed is one of the potential members of this group, but never makes the meeting because a new invention of Jethro’s, a chemical that turns water into gasoline, doesn’t work. When Jed finally arrives, it is too late, and Mr. Sebastian has left. Jane suggests that he visits him at his health club.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Sonny and Elly are getting more serious. Sonny loves Elly’s character and tells her how she makes him feel superior. But Jed worries about this courtship. However, Granny does not have any worries and does not want her granddaughter to be an old maid. During a poolside date, however, disaster strikes when Elly misunderstands the figurative nature of something Sonny has said.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: The castaways discover that their supply of fresh drinking water is running out.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: The castaways are captured by a Japanese sailor who thinks that WWII never ended, and it is up to Gilligan to save them.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Hoping to raise money now that a baby is on the way, Naomi and Vint begin selling Mama's homemade tonic.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama and Naomi suspect Vint of more than a working relationship with his new beautiful, blonde trainee.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An auditor falls for Stubing. Meanwhile, a TV actress asks Doc's help in hiding from a reporter, and a wife's old boyfriend reappears.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Mayor Pike (Dick Elliott) and the townspeople are shocked to discover that the last living descendant of Revolutionary War hero Nathan Tibbs is Mayberry's town drunk, Otis Campbell.

programme.title: Collector's Call
programme.desc: "Hooked on the music, the message, the props and its optimistic tone, Dave became enamored with Star Trek as a kid and never looked back. Since the 70’s he’s been an avid collector of not only screen-used props like Tribbles or even the space panel button from Kirk’s chair but has also amassed some amazing-looking replica items like the 3D chess set and Star Trek communicator that look as good as the real thing. Joining Dave today is his supportive wife Karen, who also likes Star Trek, just not as much as her husband. Our pop culture expert Mark Short will assess Dave’s collection and then offer him a trade-- his screen-used Star Trek prop, for one of Dave’s."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A Greek Colonel thanks the 4077th by giving them food and drink for an Easter celebration. But the feast is foiled when softhearted Radar saves the main course from the spit—a lamb, which Radar tricks Henry into giving a medical discharge and sends home to Ottumwa, Iowa. Thus, Hawkeye and Trapper invent the famed Spam Lamb!

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Frank Burns complains about Hawkeye Pierce's disrespect, and when Henry appoints Hawkeye chief surgeon, it's to Burns' shock. The rest of the 4077th "coronates" Hawk while Frank and Hot Lips complain to General Barker.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith answers the door to find a woman on the stoop with a young boy. The woman casually mentions that she's dropping Mike's son off and promptly leaves. Edith now finds herself in the awkward position of explaining to the rest of the family where the boy came from. When he finds out, a stunned Mike doesn't know what to say, but does admit to Gloria that he had been intimate with the boy's mother.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie and Mike head down to the store to get some items and on the way out Archie witnesses a mugging. Archie doesn't want to get involved in the matter and refuses to tell the police what he saw. However, when he is forced to get involved, he embellishes his story, citing that the mugging was an attempted mafia hit.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike and Gloria go away for eight days to spend some time in a commune, leaving Archie and Edith to spend some quality time together. Archie and Edith settle down for a quiet game of cards but when she lets him win, Archie insults her and they get into a big fight. Edith refuses to forgive Archie until he apologizes.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith gets a package in the mail and discovers that it is a mink cape sent to her as a 'thank you' gift by her Cousin Amelia for Edith taking care of her after a surgery. When Archie sees the cape, he is furious (since he takes it the wrong way) and demands that she give it back. However, that's when the cape is ruined in an accident and Archie sees a chance to make a three-hundred-dollar profit.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In The Boxerette, Carol boxes with Tim, who's refuses to hit a girl. Then, in The Oldest Man, officer Harvey interviews Tim, the Oldest Man, about a murder.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.sub-title: Guests Tim Conway And The Pointer Sisters
programme.desc: In Stella Toddler, Carol plays an accident-prone woman on a game show "Up Your Income". Then, in Nora Desmond, Carol plays a has-been actress who searches for a replacement for her butler.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Laura is shocked when Rob uses their breakfast banter as basis for an "Alan Brady" sketch.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Jerry constant teasing about "The Alan Brady Show" causes a rift with Rob.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.sub-title: A Woman's Work Is Never Done
programme.desc: Tired of Ralph's endless domestic complaints, Alice takes a job and leaves a maid to take care of the housework.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An alien crash-lands in a remote mountain village, stirring up fear and animosity among the villagers.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A doctor plans to marry a good-looking soloist despite warnings that her three ex-husbands all experienced brutal deaths.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: While fleeing from a sheriff's Dragnet 1967 (1967 – 1970), Kimble is rescued by a dangerous motorcycle gang called the Devil's Disciples, led by the brutal Hutch. As payback, Hutch and his gang want Kimble to help them avenge the death of a former gang me

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: On holiday and going to meet Rollin at a mountain lodge, Jim stops off in a small town. However, a young couple drop a package containing a gas gun. Exposed, an old man named Doc takes Jim prisoner. The town, it turns out, is populated entirely by enemy agents.

programme.title: Peter Gunn
programme.sub-title: Death Is A Four Letter Word
programme.desc: Lisa Randolph's well-groomed appearance belies the turmoil of her emotions, as Gunn discovers when he is asked to prevent her from committing suicide.

programme.title: Peter Gunn
programme.desc: Golf instructor Gil Manson is accused by the police of being a hit-and-run driver. Manson insists he was giving a golf lesson at the time of the accident, but his pupil has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A man sets out to get even with the Highway Patrolman who put his brother in prison.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A costumed thief calling himself "The Crimson Crusader" has been stealing comic books, movie posters and publicity photos of various superheroes.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Posing as orange growers, Friday and Gannon attempt to bust a gambling operation.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Sparks fly when Steve meets a woman to whom he is attracted.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver has his heart set on taking a swing at being a paper boy again but another kid beats him to it. This leads Beaver to think about using sabatoge to get the new paper boy fired. However, the boy may just do that himself when the service becomes terrible leading Beaver to confront him only to discover he is a she.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally's new girlfriend, Carolyn, can't go out to the movies on Saturday night because she has to watch her little sister, Susan. Carolyn suggests that Beaver take Susan out to the movies and that they all double date. Not wanting to let Wally down, Beaver decides to go along, despite being nervous.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Capering Camera
programme.desc: Scandalous photos and blackmail lead to suicide...or is it murder? Mason is resolved to find out.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: After a well-known actor with a bad reputation is murdered, Matlock is asked by a judge friend to defend his son, who had recently lost his job as bodyguard for the deceased.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Virgil's dream of a better relationship with his Aunt Ruda and her son is shattered when his cousin takes part in a string of burglaries that result in murder.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Corabeth finds a romantic letter in Ike's belongings and wants a divorce

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: When someone is scalped in Dodge, the townsfolk are eager to blame the Indians.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: After he is arrested by a sheriff for no reason, Hoss escapes from a prison wagon along with a woman whom he believes to be innocent, too.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas encourages a drunken artist charged with murder to use his talents to identify the true killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark try to persuade a persecuted young mute to return stolen money.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Indian captive Caroline Casteel is traded to a man who brings her to the wagon train. She encounters prejudice and hostility from many of the train members. But her biggest hurdle comes when her family, who had long given up hope, arrives."

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: As part of a trial program to help ground based officers better understand the abilities and limitations of helicopter assistance, malloy and reed are selected to be observers on several air support division missions. This morning's missions include a sea

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and reed take flight in separate helicopters to provide assistance in the search of a light plane stolen from the los angeles airport by a distraught man. Afterwards, they search for a group of robbery suspects who flee in separate cars, then reed

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Sergeant Baker arrives at the camp with his "moose." Hawkeye decides to find a way of getting her away from Baker. He tries ordering him to release her, tries buying her and then resorts to cheating at cards. He releases her but she won't go, so he tries to teach her how to be independent.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The 4077th is designated as the setting for the making of an army film on Mobile Army Surgical Hospital units. Hawkeye is chosen as the star while Margaret and Frank compose a screenplay. Hawkeye objects to the piece of propaganda that filmmaker Lt. Bricker is producing and, having exposed the original film, reshoots a new one his way.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: When Henry goes for some R&R, Hawkeye pretends to crack up so that Frank will let him and Trapper go on some R&R.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: John Hodges, a chopper pilot referred to as The Cowboy, has been hit in the shoulder, and arrives at the 4077th. He is expecting a letter—he's worried that his wife, Jean, is leaving him for another man. He wants to go home, but Henry refuses, stating Cowboy's wound isn't serious enough to merit a stateside ticket. Bad luck then follows Henry Blake like the seat of his pants!

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A by-the-book courthouse inspector condemns Andy and Barney's lack of proper procedure.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ellie encourages and helps a female farmhand to express her femininity.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts and Miss Jane return from spending Christmas in Hooterville to learn that Drysdale has driven after them, along with Fairchild, Elly’s bear. Back in the hills, Drysdale gets arrested for vagrancy and bootlegging in a place called Ripley. When they learn, the people at the bank couldn’t be happier that their boss has been locked up.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver gets the usual runaround from Haney when he complains about the ancient tractor he'd bought. But suddenly, it's a new, honest Haney who offers to buy back the tractor and the "dump" of a farm he sold Oliver. Coincidently, he's just learned that the Douglas farm is in the path of a proposed new highway. Oliver's soon onto his scheme and decides to make the charlatan squirm.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Gestapo gets three beautiful girls to pry secrets out of the guys.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: Man's Best Friend Is Not His Dog
programme.desc: A dog buries a bone containing film from Carter's camera that has images of a new German tank.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In The Family, Eunice takes care of her injured and demanding friend. Then, in The Wishing Well, Harvey makes a wish and won't tell Carol what it is.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Provocative Protégé
programme.desc: Washed up pianist David Carpenter is knocked out and pushed over a cliff for insurance money. Carpenter's beautiful protege, Donna Ross, immediately comes under suspicion by the police.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A ventriloquist is convinced that his dummy is not only alive but also evil.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A criminal released after 10 years in imprison plans to recover his stash.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A longtime criminal is sentenced to death for a crime he did not commit.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A political candidate hires Mannix to dig up dirt, but not on an opponent. He wants the gumshoe to dig up dirt on him.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Private eyes so rarely get a vacation free of peril, and Cannon is no exception. He goes fishing, little knowing that someone from his police past is hunting him: a murderer determined on revenge for the time he spent in prison.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A salesman murders a customer who was going to expose his corrupt business practices.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Dan Mathews and Sergeant Corey spend Christmas Eve searching for a lost girl.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Gary Crosby plays a hippie whose wife has been persuaded—by other hippies—to pass bad checks.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A girl's life hangs in the balance as the detectives search for the dog that bit her.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Steve's new romance blossoms and Robbie is offered a job at his father's firm.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally and Eddie get jobs at the Mayfield Dairy thanks to Ward pulling some strings. They soon unknowingly find themselves involved in a plot started by the foreman and his assistant, who are secretly stealing the merchandise. When Ward learns of the plot, he warns Wally who in turn tries to warn Eddie, but Eddie doesn't buy it.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: After coming home late on a school night, Ward and June punish Beaver by not allowing him to go anywhere on school nights. Beaver feels the punishment is unfair, so Eddie suggests Beaver write to an advice column.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Ice-cold Hands
programme.desc: After winning tickets at a horse track lead to accusations of theft and eventually murder, Mason must defend a woman caught in the middle.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When stockbroker Richard Wagner is murdered, his former partner, Avery Campbell, needs Julie's help to prove his innocence.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Gillespie receives word that a former Spartan is wanted for the murder of a socialite in Houston. But a ruthless bounty hunter, sent by the victim's jealous husband is already in Sparta and sees the man's sister as a means to locate his quarry.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Rose and Stanley plan to get married.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: When a new doctor arrives in Dodge, his wife starts a smear campaign against Doc Adams.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.sub-title: The Power Of Life And Death
programme.desc: Ben and Joe play a game of cat and mouse when they chase a man who shot a colonel through the desert.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A lively old lady arrives in town hot on the trail of a notorious bandit—and the reward money for capturing him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A doctor seeks revenge on the man he blames for ruining his practice.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Madame Delphine Sagittarius asks to be picked by the wagon train at Beaver City. The town is expelling her as a con woman. Charlie is initially against it but when no one else on the train accepts her, he becomes her lone supporter."

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed returns from vacation with a full-body sunburn, making for a miserable work day. Out on patrol, he and Malloy respond to a fiery traffic accident, use an informant's tip to track down a drug dealer, search for an armed robbery suspect based on a vehicle description and attempt to rescue two boys after their rowboat capsizes.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed barely get acquainted with their fill-in assignment at LAX when a security camera spots a car being stolen from a parking structure. While on foot-beat as Zebra-12 inside the airport, they find a surprise inside of a stolen suitcase, deal with a man who picks the pocket of a returning soldier, chase down a man buying airline tickets with stolen credit cards, escort a runaway boy back to his mother and track down a suspect who robbed a parking structure attendant.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: When Col. Henry Blake is transferred to Tokyo and Frank starts imposing military discipline on the camp, the surgeons will do anything to get Henry back.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A rash of thefts breaks out in the camp. Missing pieces include Frank's silver picture frame, Margaret's hair brush and Trapper's watch. The camp is searched and everything is found in Hawkeye's locker.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye moves a wounded North Korean soldier into The Swamp, rather than let him be shipped out before he's stable. During the night he and Trapper play Dracula, and siphon off a pint of Frank's blood. The soldier then contracts hepatitis, so they have to test Frank without him knowing, and have to keep him away from Margaret and the patients.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye writes home, describing Christmas in Korea: Radar ships a jeep home, a piece at a time; Henry gives the monthly lecture on sex, with the aid of figure A and figure B; Trapper helps deliver a calf; Klinger and Frank get into a fight, but Father Mulcahy smoothes things over; Hawkeye and Trapper sabotage Margaret's tent; Hawkeye flies to the front line dressed as Santa to help a wounded soldier.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Grumpy businessman Ben Weaver insists that Andy foreclose on a down-on-his-luck neighbor.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney is suspicious of Mayberry's mysterious new farmer (William Schallert).

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale has come down with the flu after spending so many nights outside while on the way to Hooterville. Granny wants to help him with her Possum Ridge Penicillin, also known as White Lightening. She leaves Drysdale a jug of it, but he puts it to the side and takes a sleeping pill. However, Elly’s bear Fairchild has taken up drinking Granny’s moonshine and climbs into his room as Drysdale is sleeping and drinks the entire jug.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Alf and Ralph announce that they are finally going to finish the Douglases' bedroom, but the project stalls when the "brothers" begging fighting. Lisa hires Ralph as their maid and Oliver can't bring himself to fire her when he discovers she's a good cook.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan's plan to blow up a rocket fuel factory boomerangs back at him.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan and his men volunteer to paint the headquarters of the Luftwaffe in order to steal an important map.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In The Family, Mama and family visit Hollywood to see her son. Then, in The Lady Heir, the gang parodies the classic film "The Heiress", with Carol as Olivia de Havilland and Roddy as Montgomery Clift.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Nine Dolls
programme.desc: Mason's fishing trip to Scotland is interrupted by seven-year-old Peggy Smith. Peggy is living at a boarding school and searching for her real parents.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a newlywed couple visit the groom's childhood home, the ties of the past prove too strong to resist.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A teenager’s desire to be free leads her to murder.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A young couple tries to smuggle a corpse out of Mexico.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A vagrant becomes the target of killers whenever he wears a patchwork coat.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "Cannon takes on a missing person's case which leads to the death of a policeman."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A rapist terrorizes a resort where Betty is vacationing.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Several law-abiding citizens unknowingly help a charming murderer escape.
